domain: mass spectrometry quadrupole ion trap stability
specific_mechanism: Quadrupole ion traps confine ions in stability regions of the Mathieu equation; specific (a,q) parameter combinations select for ion m/z; instability boundaries leak ions in mass-selective patterns
llm_application: LLM activation 'ion trap': stability-region analysis on activation gradients using Mathieu-equation parameters; selectively retain neuron activations within stability regions and let unstable activations leak.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes analytical-chemistry phase-coherence mapping as proposed.
